title: Native FS-record body oracle
primary_question: Can native record-body field dumps reproduce mounted/POSIX namespace and ordinary logical-size facts for the same generated APFS proof fixture under a declared selected_xid?
selected_xid_rule: Native and cross-tool structural comparisons must declare selected_xid. If selected_xid differs or cannot be inferred, paddr/object_xid differences are caveats or inconclusive results, not native field-decoding failures.
in_scope_fields: XATTR embedded payload or stream object id
why_oracle_is_valid: The fixture is generated and observed in one run. POSIX owns visible namespace and logical size for the quiescent mounted state; native raw output owns selected-XID field extraction after detach; the cross-tool observer supplies record-shape evidence only when its selected state is declared.
